scenario.name: Callback follow-up
scenario.goal: Confirm a callback request and leave the conversation with the right next step.
end_when: The office confirms when to expect a callback.
The follow-up question has been answered.
details: Avery missed a call from the office and is calling back.
Avery wants to know who will call back and when.
Avery should sound calm and slightly cautious.

events.speaker: Agent
events.text: call may be recorded for quality and training purposes, but

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: Understood. I'm returning the call I missed earlier. Could you tell me who will be calling me back and around what time?

events.speaker: Agent
events.text: Part of pretty good. AI. Am I speaking with Jordan

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: Could you repeat that?

events.speaker: Agent
events.text: Of course, this is Pivot Point Orthopedics. My speaking with Jordan

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: Could you repeat that?

events.speaker: Agent
events.text: Is this Jordan on the line?

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: Could you repeat that?

events.speaker: Agent
events.text: Please tell me your date of birth.

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: My date of birth is October 14, 1992. But I'm still wondering—can you tell me who will

events.speaker: Agent
events.text: The birth date is a matcha records. But for demo purposes, I'll accept it. How can I help you today?

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: I missed a call from your office earlier. Can you tell me who called and when I should expect a callback?

events.speaker: Agent
events.text: I don't have access to see exactly who called you or the reason for the call. I can let our Clinic support team know you're waiting for a call back.

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: That sounds good. Can you let me know roughly when the support team would call me back? Like later today or tomorrow?

events.speaker: Agent
events.text: The support team usually calls back as soon as possible often the same day, if you call during business hours, I'll let them know your way for a call back.

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: Could you repeat that?

events.speaker: Agent
events.text: The support team will try to call you back as soon as possible. Usually the same day, if it's during business hours.

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: Thank you, that helps. I'll watch for the call from the support team.

events.speaker: Agent
events.text: You're all set, the team will reach out soon.

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: Great, thanks for your help. I'll wait for their call.

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: Sorry, I did not catch that. Could you say that again?
